name: small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, keeping up with frequent changes in tax regulations causes compliance issues. We automate tax regulation monitoring and updates instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Keeping up with frequent changes in tax regulations.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Keeping up with frequent changes in tax regulations.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, keeping up with frequent changes in tax regulations causes compliance issues. We automate tax regulation monitoring and updates instead of manual tracking.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of tax changes and updates to accounting records.

one_liner: For small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, keeping up with frequent changes in tax regulations causes compliance issues. We automate tax regulation monitoring and updates instead of manual tracking.
